name: pc-ble-driver-py

metadata.name: pc-ble-driver-py
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for pc-ble-driver-py==0.17.0

documentation: A Python interface and library for pc-ble-driver. This allows Python applications to interface with a Nordic Semiconductor IC (both nRF51 and nRF52 series) over a serial port to obtain access to the full serialized SoftDevice API.
